subject: FW: Narrative
body:
From: Chrissy Kreisel [mailto:ckreisel@nardelloandco.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, November 07, 2007 4:42 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Narrative

 

Lesley,

 

I just gave you a call in the office but you had left for the day.  Dan
wanted me to relay to you that he's sorry that he didn't make it clear
to Jeff that the narrative takes some time as we want to make it as
detailed as possible.  It has to be compiled and then reviewed by Dan.
We expect to have it done and sent over to you sometime midday tomorrow.
Please let me know if you have any questions and if not I will email you
the narrative as soon as it is complete.

 

Thank you,

 

Chrissy

 

Chrissy Kreisel

Assistant to Dan Nardello

 

 

Nardello & Co. LLC

19 West 44th Street

New York, NY 10036

T: +1 212 537 5300

F: +1 212 537 5333

 

Nardello & Co. Ltd.

13 Harley Street

London W1G 9QG

T: +44 (0)20 7079 5900

F: +44 (0)20 7079 5919

 

 

ckreisel@nardelloandco.com

http://www.nardelloandco.com <http://www.nardelloandco.com/> 

  

= = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = =
= = = = = = =
This email and any attachments may contain privileged and confidential
attorney client 

and/or work product communications.  If you are not the intended
recipient, please 

do not read the information or disseminate it to anyone.  Please destroy
what you 

have received and so inform the sender via email or via telephone at
212.537.5300 

(collect).  Thank you for your cooperation. 

= = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = =
= = = = = = =

From: Chrissy Kreisel [mailto:ckreisel@nardelloandco.com]
Sent: Wednesday, November 07, 2007 4:42 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Narrative

 

Lesley,

 

I just gave you a call in the office but you had left for the day.  Dan wanted me to relay to you that he’s sorry that he didn’t make it clear to Jeff that the narrative takes some time as we want to make it as detailed as possible.  It has to be compiled and then reviewed by Dan.  We expect to have it done and sent over to you sometime midday tomorrow.  Please let me know if you have any questions and if not I will email you the narrative as soon as it is complete.

 

Thank you,

 

Chrissy
